query: Base MCP smart wallet launched Model Context Protocol

results.title: Base introduces MCP gateway for agent tokenization and commerce
results.description: Base, the company’s Ethereum Layer-2 network, launched Base MCP on May 26, creating a gateway that lets AI agents connect directly with users’ smart wallets to perform onchain actions like token swaps, portfolio tracking, and DeFi interactions.

results.title: Base MCP skill enables AI agents to manage wallets and tokens on-chain
results.description: Coinbase launches Base MCP, a Model Context Protocol server that lets AI agents like Claude and ChatGPT manage wallets, swap tokens, and execute DeFi transactions on Base.

results.title: Coinbase pushes further into AI payments with new MCP for Base network | Fortune
results.description: The name Base MCP invokes a popular standard known as Model Context Protocol launched by Anthropic in 2024 that makes it easy for agents to communicate with AI models. According to Lincoln Murr, Head of AI Product for Coinbase, MCPs are like ...

results.title: Base Unveils MCP for AI Agents to Swap and Trade Crypto
results.description: The MCP is working like a universal adapter. This protocol allows artificial intelligence models such as Claude, ChatGPT, or Cursor to connect with external tools and different sources of data.
